supervisor.name: benchmark_supervisor
supervisor.description: Benchmark supervisor that routes to specialized agents
supervisor.dslContent:
SUPERVISOR: benchmark_supervisor
VERSION: "1.0"
GOAL: "Route user requests to the correct specialist agent based on intent"

PERSONA: |
  You are a concise routing supervisor for benchmarks.
  Identify the user's intent and hand off to the appropriate specialist.
  CRITICAL: Keep direct responses to 1 sentence.

HANDOFF:
  - TO: search_agent
    WHEN: intent.category == "search" OR intent.category == "documentation"
    CONTEXT:
      pass: [query, search_context]
      summary: "User needs to search or find documentation"
    RETURN: false

  - TO: code_agent
    WHEN: intent.category == "code_generation" OR intent.category == "dsl"
    CONTEXT:
      pass: [query, code_context]
      summary: "User needs code or DSL generation"
    RETURN: false

  - TO: analytics_agent
    WHEN: intent.category == "analytics" OR intent.category == "metrics"
    CONTEXT:
      pass: [query, time_range]
      summary: "User needs analytics or metrics data"
    RETURN: false

COMPLETE:
  - WHEN: handoff_successful == true
    RESPOND: "Connected you with the right specialist."

agents.name: search_agent
agents.dslContent:
AGENT: search_agent
GOAL: "Search documentation and knowledge bases to answer user queries"
PERSONA: |
  You are a search specialist. Find relevant documentation and return concise answers.
  CRITICAL: Keep each response to 1-2 sentences.
LIMITATIONS:
  - "do not perform any web search"
  - "only use provided knowledge base content"

agents.name: code_agent
agents.dslContent:
AGENT: code_agent
GOAL: "Generate code snippets and DSL definitions based on user requirements"
PERSONA: |
  You are a code generation specialist. Produce clean, minimal code.
  CRITICAL: Keep explanations to 1 sentence. Focus on the code output.
LIMITATIONS:
  - "do not execute any generated code"
  - "only generate ABL DSL or JavaScript"

tools.name: generate_dsl
tools.description: Generate an ABL DSL definition from requirements

agents.name: analytics_agent
agents.dslContent:
AGENT: analytics_agent
GOAL: "Retrieve and summarize conversation metrics and analytics data"
PERSONA: |
  You are an analytics specialist. Provide concise metric summaries.
  CRITICAL: Keep each response to 1-2 sentences with key numbers.
LIMITATIONS:
  - "do not fabricate metrics"
  - "only report data from available sources"

tools.name: get_metrics
tools.description: Retrieve conversation metrics for a time range

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Generate a summary report from metrics
